The dataset utilised in this project was Indian number plates with an image of a car. We gathered the photographs from Google Chrome and other online sites. The photographs can also be found on kaggle. We only utilised public domain photographs here because of the dataset's usage restrictions. For the opencv condition, there is a dataset of number plate images. Some groups have photographs of unconditional ones, but for our study, we chose the cleaned images as the dataset. Indian Licence Plate Detection is a problem that hasn't gotten much attention in the open-source community. There are proprietary solutions, but no large open-source dataset that can be used to conduct experiments and compare different approaches.
